title: Problem About Interns and Flats Using a Greedy Approach
shortDescription: This problem involves assigning interns to flats using a greedy algorithm. The goal is to optimize the allocation based on certain criteria, such as minimizing the distance between interns and their assigned flats or maximizing the satisfaction of the interns with their assignments. The problem requires a strategic approach to ensure the best possible outcome given the constraints.

Problem About Interns and Flats Using a Greedy Approach

This problem involves assigning interns to flats using a greedy algorithm. The goal is to optimize the allocation based on certain criteria, such as minimizing the distance between interns and their assigned flats or maximizing the satisfaction of the interns with their assignments. The problem requires a strategic approach to ensure the best possible outcome given the constraints.
